title: Validating the Dietary Inflammatory Index: A Comprehensive Review for Biomedical Research and Clinical Application
description: This article provides a systematic review of the validation methodologies and applications of the Dietary Inflammatory Index (DII) and its derivatives. It explores the scientific foundation of dietary inflammatory potential scoring, examines the correlation between DII scores and established inflammatory biomarkers across diverse populations, and compares the performance of various dietary indices.
audience: researchers, scientists, and drug development professionals
